subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. Praise be to God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه مرسول واصل گردید و مضمون مفهوم شد حمد خدا را که در
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
